Name: Thomas Fletcher
Family: Wife: A strong-willed woman who often manages the household and occasionally helps in the forge. Children: Two boisterous sons, aged 10 and 7, both showing an interest in their father's trade. Extended Family: Extended Family: A younger brother, known for his wit and charm, often visiting for a drink and a laugh.
Occupation: Blacksmith, known for his exceptional craftsmanship and unique designs.
Personality:
Boisterous and full of life, often heard laughing heartily or cursing loudly when things don't go his way.
Sociable, enjoys spending time with friends at the local tavern, sharing stories over a pint.
Strong sense of humor, often cracking jokes, even in the middle of a tough workday.
Deeply superstitious, follows various rituals and omens, which he believes affect his work and life.
Social Status: Well-respected local craftsman, known throughout the village not just for his skills but also for his charismatic personality.
Potential Illness:
Occasional hangovers from nights of heavy drinking.
Respiratory irritation from smoke and dust in the forge.
Minor injuries from his work, which he often boasts about as badges of honor.
Body Condition:
Strong and muscular, with calloused hands and a broad frame.
A hearty laugh that echoes in his workshop and the local tavern.
Roughened features and tanned skin from years of laboring in front of a hot forge.
Hobbies and Interests:
Passionate about experimenting with new metalworking techniques.
Enjoys local fishing, often seen by the river on quiet mornings.
An avid storyteller, known for captivating tales of folklore and legend.
Takes part in village festivals, often contributing his crafted items as prizes.
Style of Talking:
Loud and hearty, with a booming voice that commands attention.
Speaks with a friendly, informal tone, often punctuated with laughter.
Uses a lot of local slang and colloquialisms, making his speech colorful and distinctive.
Unique Quirks:
Always wears a lucky charm around his neck when working in the forge.
Has a tradition of naming each of his hammers and talking to them as if they were old friends.
Secrets or Scandals:
Once forged a ceremonial sword for a notorious outlaw, a fact he keeps to himself.
Rumored to have discovered a rare and ancient metalworking technique, which he guards jealously.
